hero.headline: MarTech That Actually Works.
hero.subheadline: AKA Digital is the region's leading B2B marketing technology agency. Vietnam's exclusive representative for Mixpanel, Salesforce, Oracle, CleverTap, MoEngage, and more — licensed to operate across Southeast Asia.

value_proposition.headline: The MarTech Partner Southeast Asia Trusts
value_proposition.body: AKA Digital bridges the gap between world-class marketing technology and real business outcomes. As Vietnam's exclusive representative for leading global MarTech platforms — and a licensed operator across Southeast Asia — we implement, manage, and optimise the tools that turn data into measurable revenue.

media_mentions.quote: Data Solution Summit 2024: 80% of enterprises invest in software but only use 20% of functions — AKA Digital tackles this gap head-on.
Growing demand for marketing automation solutions as e-commerce businesses in Vietnam seek scalable personalisation.
Improve customer experience: how brands in Vietnam are aligning technology with customer lifecycle strategy.
Vietnam's digital marketing sector sees surge in enterprise demand for first-party data strategies.
AKA Digital positions Vietnam as a regional hub for marketing technology adoption in Southeast Asia.
MMA Smarties Silver 2022: AKA Digital's FE Credit campaign earns top honour for mobile marketing excellence.
Data-driven marketing is no longer optional — businesses that invest now will own the customer relationship.
CDP adoption in Vietnam accelerates as brands seek to reduce reliance on third-party cookies.
